data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies choices to improve user decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: Minimal main menu items and concise navigation paths.

data.title: Fitts’ Law
data.description: Optimizes interactive elements to be larger and closer, enhancing usability.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Employs principles like similarity, proximity, and closure for better visual organization.
data.technical_spec: Consistent styling and grouped content sections.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits presented options to prevent cognitive overload.
data.technical_spec: Clear and limited information display per screen.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligns user experience with common patterns users are already familiar with.
